trigger.actions_1_targetA: Humans will have to survive for 2:30
Zombies will get guns at 1:15 get them at the acid pool in the middle. They can also use slot 1 to deploy cover (10 sec cooldown)
Thats it, have fun and dont forget to leave a rating!

trigger.actions_2_targetA: Zombies get guns now! Find them at the acid pool in the middle

trigger.actions_1_targetA: Humans win! Zombie hp reduced to 350
